assertionResults.title: "Rotate Share" renamed to "Replace Share" everywhere
assertionResults.notes: Key-page DOM sweep showed rotateShareCount=0 on / and /demo, with Replace Share present on /demo; source hits for "rotate share" were confined to test text/regex, not user-facing screen/style surfaces.

assertionResults.title: "Rotate Share" rename sweeps source code and CSS
assertionResults.notes: No legacy rotate-share tokens found in src/screens or src/styles; Replace Share appears in expected user-facing surfaces.

assertionResults.title: IndexedDB schema migrations preserve data
assertionResults.notes: Both required migration suites passed (19/19 tests): profileMigration + profileStore.migration.

assertionResults.title: Terminology migration: "Rotate Share" → "Replace Share"
assertionResults.issues: Contract clause requires `rg -n "Rotate Share" src` to return zero lines; exact grep returned 4 lines in src/__tests__/noRotateShareTerminology.test.ts despite UI/demo sweep showing zero rendered Rotate Share and Replace Share present.

frictions.description: DashboardInteractions vitest run emits known stderr warnings (nested <button> warning and jsdom window.scrollTo not implemented) even though tests pass.
frictions.resolution: Continued validation because targeted suites exited 0 and warnings are pre-existing/non-blocking for assigned assertions.
